info.title: Acme Bank Location Services API
info.description:
Branch and ATM location search service for the Voice Banking Assistant.

Provides distance-sorted branch search by city, address, postal code,
or GPS coordinates. When no explicit coordinates are provided, city
centroids (derived from the branch data itself) are used as the
reference point for distance sorting.

This API is designed to be consumed by:
- AI agents (LLM tool calls via ADK/Langchain)
- Voice banking orchestration services (Dialogflow CX webhooks)
- Mobile and web frontends

Data: 238 branches (Deutsche Bank + Postbank) across 50 German cities.
Data source: Deutsche Bank Filialfinder API.

tags.name: Location Services
tags.description: Branch and ATM location search for the Voice Banking Assistant

get.description:
Search for bank branches by city, address, postal code, GPS coordinates, or brand.
All filter parameters are optional and can be combined.
Supports multi-brand: Deutsche Bank and Postbank.

Results are always distance-sorted from a reference point:
- If latitude/longitude provided â sort from those coordinates
- If only city provided â sort from city centroid (average of all branches in that city)
- If only postal code provided â sort from postal code centroid
- Otherwise â sort from the geographic centre of all branch data

The reference point used is included in the response for transparency.
Data sourced from the Deutsche Bank Filialfinder API.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City name (case-insensitive, partial match). E.g., 'Frankfurt' matches 'Frankfurt am Main'.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Street name or landmark (partial match, also searches branch names). E.g., 'Alexanderplatz' or 'HauptstraÃe'.

parameters.name: postalCode
parameters.description: Postal code prefix (matches start of PLZ). E.g., '50' matches all branches in the 50xxx area.

parameters.name: latitude
parameters.description: Caller's latitude for distance-based sorting and radius filtering. Must be provided together with longitude.

parameters.name: longitude
parameters.description: Caller's longitude for distance-based sorting and radius filtering. Must be provided together with latitude.

parameters.name: radiusKm
parameters.description: Search radius in kilometres (only applies when lat/lon provided). Default: 50 km.

parameters.name: brand
parameters.description: Filter by bank brand. Values: 'Deutsche Bank', 'Postbank'.

parameters.name: accessible
parameters.description: If true, return only wheelchair-accessible branches.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 50).

200.description: Search results (may be empty if no branches match)

get.description:
Returns full details for a specific branch by its unique identifier.
Includes address, opening hours, phone, and accessibility information.

The opening hours string is in German format and can be parsed by the LLM
to answer questions like "Is it open on Saturday?" or "What time does it close?".

openingHours.description: Opening hours in German format. The LLM can parse this directly.

wheelchairAccessible.description: Whether the branch has wheelchair/barrier-free access

advisoryAvailable.description: Whether the branch offers advisory or consultation services

transitInfo.example: U- und S Bahn: Station Wandsbeker Chaussee mit U1 und S1

distanceKm.description: Distance from search reference point in kilometres. Null if no geographic reference point was used.

BranchDto.description: Bank branch or service centre information

branches.description: Matching branches, sorted by distance from the reference point

count.description: Number of branches returned (after limit applied)

totalMatches.description: Total branches matching filters before limit was applied

BranchSearchResponse.description: Branch search results with distance-sorting context

isFirst.description: Whether this is the first page

isLast.description: Whether this is the last page

source.description: How the reference point was determined: PROVIDED_COORDINATES (caller's GPS), CITY_CENTROID (average of all branches in the searched city), POSTAL_CODE_CENTROID (average of branches matching postal code), DATA_CENTROID (fallback: centre of all branch data)

ReferencePoint.description: Geographic reference point and its source

bearerAuth.description: JWT token from Acme Bank authentication service. Required header: Authorization: Bearer <token>
